title: runtime.json — per-conversation engine state
description: The engine's typed state for one conversation, written every turn (N15) to mary-memory/runtime/<machine>/<conv>.json. This is STATE, not a transcript (no turns). Distillation reads it; the logbook is derived from it. NOTE: today's real files do not yet satisfy the `required` block (id is null, no operator_id, no created_at) — validating them against this schema is expected to FAIL, and that failure is the spec for the proxy-stamping work (ADR-0001).

id.description: Conversation/session id (currently null in production — must be populated; equals the filename today).

status.description: Engine terminal state. open = in progress; resolved = fixed (promotable); unresolved = terminal, not fixed. NB: real files currently write color values (green/amber/red) — reconcile green→resolved at the writer.

operator_id.description: Who ran the session. Canonical key (reconcile from vault.user_id). Absent in real files today — required.

source_app.description: Which Dify app produced this (app slug). Provenance + registry join.

created_at.description: Session start. The 'day' the logbook orders by. Absent today — required.

knowledge_version.description: Which knowledge.json build Mary ran against (reproducibility). Nice-to-have.

$soul_version.description: Which Mary prompt/soul version ran, e.g. 'draft'.

sanity_notes.description: Early context the operator gave / Mary captured.

attempts.description: Fixes attempted (shape TBD; loose until finalised).

matched_fm.description: Failure mode the engine matched (fm_...), or null.

confirmed_cause.description: Cause confirmed within the matched FM (cause_...), or null.

procedure.description: Procedure followed to resolve (proc_...), or null.

resolution_note.description: The operator's closing words. Source for the logbook's 'resolution' and get-machine's memory_captured.

ruled_out.description: Failure modes / causes eliminated. Nice-to-have; feeds distillation discriminators.

_clarify.description: Candidate FMs Mary offered when it couldn't disambiguate.

then.description: A resolved session should carry resolved_at (and, recommended, matched_fm + resolution_note).
